Error.description:
We've unfortunately encountered an error.

You can try to reload the page you were visiting.
Error.title: Something went wrong!

IndexPage.description: This is a basic example that demonstrates the usage of next-intl with the Next.js App Router. Try changing the locale in the top right corner and see how the content changes.
IndexPage.title: B&D Media

LocaleSwitcher.label: Change language
LocaleSwitcher.locale: {locale, select, en {English} zh_CN {简体中文} other {Unknown}}

NotFoundPage.description: Please double-check the browser address bar or use the navigation to go to a known page.
NotFoundPage.title: Page not found

docs.description: Learn more about next-intl in the official docs.
docs.title: Docs

source.description: Browse the source code of this example on GitHub.
source.title: Source code

PathnamesPage.description:
The pathnames are internationalized too.

If you're using the default language English, you'll see /en/pathnames in the browser address bar on this page.

If you change the locale to German, the URL is localized accordingly (/de/pfadnamen).
PathnamesPage.title: Pathnames

hero.title: Diverse Brand Communication Solutions
hero.subtitle: We help brands connect with their audience through strategic communication

clients.title: Our Clients
clients.description: Trusted by leading brands across industries

industries.title: Industries We Serve
industries.description: We work with clients across various sectors including technology, finance, healthcare, retail, and more

connecting.title: Connecting Brands to Global Audience
connecting.description: B&D Media is a creative agency based in Toronto and Beijing, specializing in impactful brand communication. We combine strategy, storytelling, and technology to help brands connect with audiences through video production, digital content, and integrated marketing.

ourStory.title: Our Story
ourStory.description: Founded in 2023, we have been dedicated to providing innovative solutions. Our journey began with a simple idea: to make technology accessible to everyone, and has since evolved into a comprehensive platform for learning and growth.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We strive to empower individuals and organizations through technology education. Our team is committed to delivering excellence in everything we do.

ContactPage.title: Contact Us
ContactPage.contactIntro: Have questions or want to learn more? Fill out the form below and our team will get back to you as soon as possible.

form.name: Name
form.successMessage: Thank you for your message! We will get back to you soon.
form.errorMessage: An error occurred while submitting your message. Please try again.

Footer.title: Footer
Footer.description: Founded in 2004, B&D Media is a global creative agency based in Toronto and Beijing, specializing in strategy, storytelling, and integrated marketing.
